alt: Wide coastal view of Lima from Miraflores showing the dramatic Costa Verde cliffs descending to a Pacific beach, the coastal highway, stone breakwaters reaching into the ocean, and the grey overcast sky typical of Lima winters
description: High-angle view of the Costa Verde coastline below Miraflores in Lima, Peru. The Costa Verde cliffs descend to the Pacific, with the coastal highway winding at their base and stone breakwaters extending into the surf. The characteristic grey garua sky of the Lima winter is overhead.
title: Coastal View of Miraflores in Lima, Peru
